About Us

Technology Driven, Navigating the Future

HongKong Liocrebif Technology Co., Ltd is a high-tech enterprise specializing in navigation technology, optical devices, and precision machinery.

🎯

Our Mission

To deliver precision inertial navigation and fiber optic sensing solutions that empower our customers to operate with confidence in the most demanding environments.

🔭

Our Vision

To become a globally recognized leader in inertial technology, driving innovation from core optical sensors to complete navigation systems — all under one roof.

⚙️

Our Approach

Vertical integration is our advantage. By controlling every step — from fiber coil winding to system calibration — we ensure quality, performance, and cost-effectiveness.

Our Journey

2019
2019

Company Founded

HongKong Liocrebif Technology Co., Ltd established with a focus on inertial navigation and fiber optic sensing technology.

2020
2020

Core Technology Development

Established in-house FOG and MEMS gyroscope R&D capabilities. Built the core team of inertial navigation experts.

2022
2022

Industrial Park & Production Scale-Up

Established 13,300㎡ self-owned Optoelectronic Industrial Park with full production lines covering components, sensors, and systems.

2024
2024

Global Expansion

Products now serving 30+ countries. Continued investment in next-generation navigation technology and international partnerships.

Our Facility

Our 13,300-square-meter self-owned Optoelectronic Industrial Park houses R&D, production, and calibration under one roof. This vertical integration enables rapid prototyping, strict quality control, and competitive pricing — from fiber coil winding to final system integration.

13,300㎡
Industrial Park Area
50+
Team Members
30+
Countries Served
24/7
Technical Support
